label: source_file
description: Source document filename or identifier used to trace extracted treatment records.

label: treatment_process
description: Treatment process such as adsorption, photocatalysis, oxidation, reduction, membrane separation, or remediation.

label: pollutant
description: Target pollutant or contaminant. Preserve naming and verify compound identity manually.

label: initial_concentration_mg_l
description: Initial pollutant concentration in mg/L. Convert units only when clearly supported.

label: solution_volume_ml
description: Solution volume in mL used in the treatment experiment.

label: catalyst_or_adsorbent
description: Catalyst, adsorbent, membrane, reagent, or treatment material used in the experiment.

label: dosage_g_l
description: Material dosage in g/L when reported. Check whether the basis is volume or mass.

label: light_source
description: Light source, wavelength, power, or irradiation condition for photochemical treatment.

label: oxidant
description: Oxidant, reductant, activator, or auxiliary reagent used in the treatment process.

label: ph
description: Solution pH. Verify whether pH is initial, adjusted, buffered, or monitored during treatment.

label: temperature_c
description: Treatment temperature in Celsius when reported.

label: reaction_time_min
description: Treatment or reaction time in minutes. Check whether equilibrium time or sampling time is reported.

label: removal_efficiency_percent
description: Removal efficiency in percent. Removal and degradation may not be equivalent and must be manually checked.

label: degradation_efficiency_percent
description: Degradation efficiency in percent. Confirm whether mineralization, transformation, or disappearance is measured.

label: adsorption_capacity_mg_g
description: Adsorption capacity in mg/g. Verify equilibrium basis and concentration calculation.

label: rate_constant
description: Kinetic rate constant and its unit when reported. Verify model assumptions manually.

label: water_matrix
description: Water matrix such as synthetic solution, tap water, wastewater, groundwater, or seawater.

label: analysis_method
description: Analytical method used to measure pollutant concentration or transformation.

label: reuse_cycles
description: Number of reuse or regeneration cycles when reported.

label: data_source_location
description: Location of the extracted value, such as table, figure, caption, or method section.

label: notes
description: Short caveats about basis, units, matrix effects, or manual review needs.
